creator: r.gruyters@snow.nl
text:
Hello,

This patch is approved and can be commited.

With kind regards,

Robin Gruyters
Snow B.V.


Quoting Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org>:

> Maintainer of security/prelude-lml,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/131287 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/131287
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
